---
title: "Indian Flights Dashboard — Project Report"
subtitle: "Visualization of Information"
format: html
---

<!--
Skeleton only — fill in per PLAN.md's "Report Structure" section, which
maps each heading below to the rubric and lists which lecture theory to
cite. Each group member writes the section(s) assigned to them in
PLAN.md's "Team Task Breakdown".
-->

## 1. Problem Definition

## 2. Data Understanding

## 3. Data Processing

## 4. Visualization & Interaction Design

### 4.1 Chart-by-chart justification

### 4.2 The pie-chart decision

### 4.3 Interaction design (9 operators)

### 4.4 Dashboard layout

## 5. AI Usage Documentation

See `ai_prompt_appendix.md` for the full prompt log.

## 6. Evaluation & Reflection

## 7. Deliverables Checklist

- [ ] Report (this document)
- [ ] Source code (GitHub repo)
- [ ] AI prompt appendix (`ai_prompt_appendix.md`)
- [ ] Working demo (10–15 min live presentation)
